title: First Battle of Obroa-skai

{{Quote|Since entering the Tingel Arm, the Yuuzhan Vong have been moving oblique to the Core. The attack on Obroa-skai may mark the beginning of a push into the Mid Rim.|[[Ixidro Legorburu]]|<ref name="Hero's Trial" />}}
The '''First Battle of Obroa-skai''' during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] was a major victory for the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces. The capture of the [[Planet/Legends|world]] known for its immense libraries and wealth of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] knowledge was crucial in providing the invaders with key intelligence and information on the various species and worlds of the galaxy.

==Pre-battle==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] assault of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces were defeated at [[Battle of the Corsin system|Corsin]]. They retreated to [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] and the Vong pursued them along the [[Vaathkree Trade Corridor/Legends|Vaathkree Trade Corridor]]. The planet [[Kroctar]] surrendered but [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]] didn't.<ref name="Atlas" />

Despite the fact that [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai's]] library was one of the most important assets to the New Republic government, defenses at the world were minor in the lead up to the battle. Despite the pleading of the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology|Obroan Institute]] and its director, [[Bel-dar-Nolek]], the world's defenses consisted of only a pair of reconditioned [[Golan space defense platform|Golan Defense Platforms]] and a handful of antiquated warships. These forces would be woefully inadequate in defending Obroa-skai from attack.

==Battle==
{{Quote|The infidels fought well and died bravely.|One of [[Harrar]]'s acolytes|<ref name="Hero's Trial" />}}
The battle was presumably quick, as the meager New Republic defenses were shattered by the Yuuzhan Vong invasion forces. The pair of Golan platforms and handful of warships were brushed aside as Yuuzhan Vong forces settled into an orbital bombardment. A quartet of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] fighters were among the only forces to escape the battle, managing to destroy a Yuuzhan Vong [[Uumufalh|gunship]] before retreating.

==Aftermath==
Normally a world appearing green, blue, and white from space, Obroa-skai turned ash-gray and reddish-brown as Yuuzhan Vong warships laid waste to the world. Large tracks of verdant rainforest were turned to ash while the planet's glaciers and small oceans were vaporized. The few major cities were bombarded and eventually conquered as Yuuzhan Vong warriors captured scientists and researchers for sacrifice. The planet and its libraries then passed into the possession of the [[Priest caste]], which was tasked with translating the various texts into [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Yuuzhan Vong]].

The loss of Obroa-skai shocked the galaxy, while further driving a wedge between New Republic worlds located in the invasion path and those safely located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. The [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] began to blame the [[New Jedi Order]] while some members began to contemplate a separate peace with the invaders.

The Yuuzhan Vong also captured several capital ships in dry dock and gave them to the collaborationist [[Peace Brigade]].<ref name="Ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>
